legacy.full_text:
🏴 PFP Contest 🏴

Show your dark side to the world. We’re giving 5 WL spots to those who represent iconito through their PFP 📸

How to enter:
→ Follow @iconitoNFT
→ Like & RT this post
→ Set your PFP with your favorite iconito and comment it

Results in 48h. Good luck 🤞🖤 https://t.co/mgCFvKvTEz

Congrats to @Frost133567 @not_reso69 @BaucsG @SkyWeCare @DavidL1x @Marky42033199 

The shadows are proud of you.
Now, join our Discord and open a ticket to claim your spot 🏴

Thanks to everyone who participated, we love you 💛
